checks.title: Risk level matches data class
checks.detail: Confidential, personal, regulated or secret-related data needs at least medium risk.

checks.title: Regulated and personal data escalate to high risk
checks.detail: Personal, regulated or secret-related data needs high or critical risk.

checks.title: Personal data is explicitly blocked or governed
checks.detail: Personal data requires high/critical risk and an explicit blocked or governed data statement.

checks.title: Secrets remain denied
checks.detail: Secrets are blocked by this boilerplate until exceptional security approval and a dedicated secret-handling plan exist.

checks.title: Blocked tools protect real systems
checks.detail: Blocked tools must explicitly prevent production changes, real systems/databases and secrets.

checks.title: Approval roles cover governance and security
checks.detail: Medium or higher risk requires governance or security review coverage.

checks.title: Approval scope preserves deployment and data limits
checks.detail: Implementation approval must state data, secrets and deployment boundaries.

checks.title: QA auditor cannot self-approve or edit audited work
checks.detail: QA Auditor packs must preserve independence: no self-approval and no editing audited work.

checks.title: Evidence requirements support reproducibility
checks.detail: Evidence requirements should name concrete proof such as tests, reproduction steps, files or screenshots.

checks.title: Stop rules block unsafe bypasses
checks.detail: Stop rules must block governance bypass, self-approval, secrets and real data.
